children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The agency shall conduct a full reinvestigation of the cold case murder at issue if the review of the case file required by concludes that a full reinvestigation of such cold case murder would result in probative investigative leads.section 60901 of this title

children.heading: Reinvestigation
children.label: b Reinvestigation
children.text: A full reinvestigation shall include analyzing all evidence regarding the cold case murder at issue for the purpose of developing probative investigative leads or a likely perpetrator.

children.heading: Reviewer
children.label: c Reviewer
children.text: A reinvestigation required under subsection (a) shall not be conducted by a person who previously investigated the murder at issue.

children.heading: Prohibition on multiple concurrent reviews
children.label: d Prohibition on multiple concurrent reviews
children.text: Only one full reinvestigation shall be undertaken at any one time with respect to the same cold case murder victim.
